description: Research common web application vulnerabilities (e.g., SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF) and their exploitation techniques.
Identify and analyze specific tools used for exploiting web application vulnerabilities (e.g., Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP).
Gather case studies or examples of successful exploitation of web application vulnerabilities.
Compile a list of best practices for mitigating web application vulnerabilities post-exploitation.
Synthesize findings into a structured report detailing exploitation techniques and examples.
